issue_title: from airflow.operators.python import PythonOperator does not work
issue_body:
This is not necessarily a bug in core Airflow, but the upgrade-check scripts recommend this as a solution when the old 1.10.x version of importing the python operator is used. 

So, there is a mismatch between the core Airflow code and the recommendations given in the upgrade check.

pr_title: Don't suggest change to users that will break dags on 1.10.x
pr_body:
We don't have airflow.operators.python etc in 1.10.x, so suggesting
users change this would break their dags currently.

Closes #12895
